/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared  -o rosidl_generator_py/pubsub2_interfaces/pubsub2_interfaces_s__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/pubsub2_interfaces_s__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_generator_py/pubsub2_interfaces/_pubsub2_interfaces_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/mariola/visual_ws/build/pubsub2_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libpubsub2_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so libpubsub2_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so libpubsub2_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so libpubsub2_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
